title: Reuben Kaye: Live and Intimidating
full_description: An explosion of high camp and filthy humour from the obscenely intelligent, rib-crackingly funny Australian performer. A Swarovski-studded revolt about what happens when you tell your children they can be anything. Addresses his upbringing in a Jewish immigrant household, the toxicity of homophobic Australian rules football, and the fallout from a viral Channel 4 video resulting in death threats — Reuben at his most fearlessly amusing and ferociously defiant.
ai_summary: Reuben Kaye's defiant follow-up — a sequinned polemic about being queer in a world increasingly keen to silence it, weaving his Jewish immigrant upbringing, homophobic footballers, and death threats from the Christian right into one hour of high-camp fury.
